{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":463794,"duration_api_ms":422156,"num_turns":50,"result":"Phase 2 완료. 작업 요약:

**변경 파일 6개:**

1. **`dto/split-contact.dto.ts`** (신규) — `SplitContactDto` (count 2~10), `SplitContactItemDto` (subject/description optional)
2. **`contact-timeline.service.ts`** — `changeType`에 `'split'` 추가
3. **`contacts.gateway.ts`** — `emitContactSplit()` WebSocket 이벤트 메서드 추가
4. **`contacts.service.ts`** — `splitContact()` (유효성검증 → $transaction 원자적 생성 → 타임라인 fire-and-forget → WebSocket), `getChildren()` (splitIndex ASC + include workerNotes/drawingRevisions), toSnakeCase에 분할 필드 4개 매핑 추가
5. **`contacts.controller.ts`** — `POST :id/split`, `GET :id/children` 엔드포인트 추가
6. **`index.json`** — phase 2 status → `completed`

**비즈니스 규칙 구현:**
- 하위 문의 분할 불가, 재분할 불가, drawing 이전 단계만 분할 가능
- 하위번호: 원본 inquiryNumber/workNumber에 `-N` suffix
- 자식 생성 시 배송/제품 정보 복사, 도면파일은 null
- `$transaction`으로 원자적 실행, 타임라인은 fire-and-forget","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"65f9a5e2-4279-432f-88a3-0987c675e5e1","total_cost_usd":3.1117850000000007,"usage":{"input_tokens":80,"cache_creation_input_tokens":171806,"cache_read_input_tokens":2730145,"output_tokens":26901,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":171806},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":3,"output_tokens":429,"cache_read_input_tokens":126756,"cache_creation_input_tokens":443,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":443,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":80,"outputTokens":26901,"cacheReadInputTokens":2730145,"cacheCreationInputTokens":171806,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.1117850000000007,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"4eaa0647-74a8-4b1a-9d30-9129cdc2eed7"}
